understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the '+' goal gem tile on each level by moving horizontally and using gravity, while avoiding spike tiles that end the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity automatically pulls the player in the current direction (down or up) until landing on a safe tile or a hazard. CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles at a specified coordinate, opening paths. UNDO reverses the last action. Spikes ('u'/'v') cause instant failure. Each attempt had a 50-turn limit and levels had 2 attempts.

understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity automatically pulls the player in the current direction (down or up) until landing on a safe tile or a hazard. CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles at a specified coordinate, opening paths. UNDO reverses the last action. Spikes ('u'/'v') cause instant failure.
